overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis. The player navigates a vehicle through neon-lit streets, passing under elevated highways and alongside diverse traffic including a distinctive green muscle car. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine rendering with vibrant holographic billboards and dense urban architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

tall futuristic buildings with mixed glass and steel construction

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a wide commercial boulevard. Holographic billboards and towering cyberpunk architecture line the street while the vehicle approaches an intersection. Sparse traffic moves ahead on the multi-lane asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with yellow structural beams

events.description: entering covered area beneath elevated highway structure
exiting shadow of overpass back into direct afternoon light

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while passing under the elevated highway system

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking on sidewalk parallel to vehicle

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with distinctive yellow structural beams and supports
thick cylindrical columns holding up the overhead roadway
ground floor commercial spaces with awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a semi-covered corridor beneath a massive yellow elevated highway structure. Concrete pillars line the left side while street-level shops occupy the right. The lighting shifts to dappled shadows cast by the overhead beams before opening back up to the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with left turn into commercial district

events.description: executing left turn at intersection onto new street
green vintage muscle car pulls alongside on the left

agents.ego_description: signaling and executing left turn, then accelerating alongside traffic

white delivery van moving slowly ahead in traffic

entered.detail: large commercial structure with prominent DATA INC signage and purple holographic displays
vintage-style two-door vehicle with metallic green paint and black racing stripes
boxy commercial vehicle with red taillights stopped or moving slowly ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a left turn at an intersection, entering a new street dominated by the DATA INC building on the left. A distinctive green muscle car pulls alongside and passes the player vehicle. The scene features moderate traffic density with a white delivery van ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with dense neon signage and commercial facades

events.description: green muscle car pulls ahead and moves into distance
entering deeply enclosed urban canyon with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: following traffic flow through narrow commercial street, observing neon storefronts

notable_agents.action: security guard in yellow vest standing near building entrance

entered.detail: elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glass enclosure
safety barriers along the sidewalk edge with bright yellow paint
commercial entrances with glowing pink and purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow urban canyon, the vehicle passes beneath a pedestrian overpass while neon storefronts glow on the right. The DATA INC building remains visible on the left as the green muscle car pulls ahead. The environment feels enclosed with tall buildings on both sides of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional avenue leading to open plaza area

events.description: road opens up to wider avenue with distant city skyline visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through less dense area toward open plaza, sparse traffic ahead

entered.detail: curved on-ramp structure with yellow support columns
wide open space ahead with reduced building density and visible sky
orange construction cones lining the right edge of the roadway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle emerging from the urban canyon onto a wider transitional avenue. The DATA INC building and dense neon signage fall behind as the road opens toward a distant plaza. An elevated highway ramp curves on the right while traffic cones line the street edge, and the city skyline stretches ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a futuristic metropolis, transitioning from a wide commercial boulevard into a dense urban canyon before emerging onto an open transitional avenue. It begins by cruising past towering holographic billboards and cyberpunk architecture toward an intersection, then glides into a semi-covered corridor where the light shifts into dappled shadows beneath a massive yellow elevated highway. As the vehicle executes a left turn, the scene opens up to reveal the DATA INC building and a distinctive green muscle car that pulls alongside the player. The environment then tightens into a narrow urban canyon of glowing neon storefronts and pedestrian overpasses before the road finally expands again. The drive concludes as the dense signage falls behind and the view opens toward a distant plaza and a curving highway ramp under the sprawling city skyline.
